query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS spectator_sessions (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  matchId INT NOT NULL,
  matchType ENUM('game', 'tournament') NOT NULL,
  spectatorId INT NOT NULL,
  joinedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  leftAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_match (matchId, matchType),
  INDEX idx_spectator (spectatorId)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS spectator_sessions (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  matchId INT NOT NULL,
  matchType ENUM('game', 'tournament') NOT NULL,
  spectatorId INT NOT NULL,
  joinedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  leftAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_match (matchId, matchType),
  INDEX idx_spectator (spectatorId)
);
